title: Diagnose why all personas show CLAUDE in congress cards

log.context: Diagnose why all personas show CLAUDE in congress cards

31 existing sessions all have `model: null` in their rosters. The fix only affects new sessions going forward. If historical backfill is wanted, a migration script would be needed — but that wasn't asked for.

---

Here is the complete diagnosis:

**Root cause:** `/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`, in the `congress_start` handler (line 818–829), builds a roster snapshot and writes it into the session JSON file. That snapshot included `display_name`, `title`, `avatar_url`, `role`, etc. from frontma...(truncated)
